reasoning: To resolve Yes, the r/Keep_Track "Project 2025 Tracker" must have marked the objective to "break up NOAA" as "complete" before July 1, 2025. Evidence clearly shows NOAA was not broken up by that date. Congress passed a full-year continuing resolution for NOAA in March 2025, preserving its funding. In July 2025, the Trump administration released a budget document proposing to cut NOAA's budget by 30% and its workforce by 18%, but this was merely a proposal pending congressional approval. By January 2026, Congress largely rejected these cuts and fully funded NOAA. Because the agency remained intact and structural changes were only at the proposal stage as of July 1, 2025, a rigorous tracker like Keep_Track would confidently maintain the status as 'in progress' or similar, not 'complete'. Therefore, resolution is almost certainly No.
